metaDescription: Claude Mythos 5 (Anthropic), released 2026-06-09 — part of the Claude Fable / Mythos (Mythos-class) line. Same underlying model as Fable 5 with some safeguards…
overview: Claude Mythos 5 is a large language model from Anthropic, part of the Claude Fable / Mythos (Mythos-class) line. Released 2026-06-09. Anthropic's most capable, top-end tier — a higher intelligence class than Opus, released publicly as Fable 5 with safety classifiers and to restricted partners as Mythos 5.

What's notable in this version: Same underlying model as Fable 5 with some safeguards lifted; available only through Project Glasswing (cyberdefense/infrastructure partners, with the US government). Succeeds Mythos Preview at substantially lower cost.
